title: Soul system
description: Soul system adding souls that can be received from killing players, losing upon death, reach 0 get banned. Also usable in Mythicblades recipes
body:
# Soul System

## THIS IS MADE TO BE USED WITH :
[mythicblades](https://modrinth.com/plugin/mythicblades)

Description: Soul System is an engaging Minecraft 1.21 plugin that transforms player interactions and survival! In this plugin, players drop a soul upon death, creating an intriguing new dynamic in your gameplay. Starting with 10 souls, you can earn additional souls by defeating other players, rewarding skilled combatants and strategic thinkers alike.

However, be cautious—if your soul count reaches zero, you will face a temporary ban until you can be revived by a teammate or other players. Souls play a crucial role in the crafting of powerful Mythical Blades, encouraging players to collect and manage their souls wisely.

Immerse yourself in the Soul System, where every death and kill matters, and use your souls to carve your path to victory! Will you become a legendary warrior or succumb to the depths of despair? The choice is yours!
